name: Steamed Coconut Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all the ingredients for the dark mixture well and fill 15 large foil cups half full.
2. Steam over medium heat for 20 minutes, or until the mixture is set.
3. Blend the ingredients for the light mixture and put about 2 tbsp in each foil cup.
4. Steam another 25 minutes, or until it appears dry on top.
5. Cool and run a knife around the foil cup to facilitate removal.
6. Serve cool or at room temperature with the light side up.
